name: PER_PREVIOUS_EMPLOYERS
description: Details about the previous employers that the employee worked for before the current enterprise.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_EMPLOYER_ID
columns.Comments: Surrogate ID for Previous Employer record

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the FK of the person to which previous employer record applies

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date of the Previous Employer Record

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End Date of the Previous Employer Record

columns.Name: PERIOD_YEARS
columns.Comments: The whole number of years at the previous employer

columns.Name: PERIOD_DAYS
columns.Comments: The Number of days on top of the whole year at the previous employer

columns.Name: EMPLOYER_NAME
columns.Comments: Identifier for the employer

columns.Name: EMPLOYER_COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Country of the Employer

columns.Name: EMPLOYER_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Address for the employer

columns.Name: EMPLOYER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Category of the employer

columns.Name: EMPLOYER_SUBTYPE
columns.Comments: Category of the employer

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description for the service history period

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: ALL_ASSIGNMENTS
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not used anymore.

columns.Name: PERIOD_MONTHS
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not used anymore.
